title: Contracts Amendment and Processing for On-Board Seafarers. Any
content: 21 alteration or change in any part of the DMW-approved SEC for on-board seafarers shall 22 be evaluated, verified, processed and approved by the Department upon submission of 23 documentary requirements and payment of the processing fee, as prescribed by 24 appropriate issuances or guidelines. 25 26 For this purpose, no fee shall be collected, directly or indirectly, from the seafarer. 27 28

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
